question.text: Currency futures contracts can extend up to a maximum of:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Currency futures contracts can extend up to one year, with weekly and monthly cycles. The 12 serial monthly contracts span one full year. **The Trap:** While equity derivatives may have longer-term contracts, currency futures max out at 1 year. **Cross-Exam Context:** Contract cycle limits are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For hedging beyond 1 year, OTC forwards are necessary since exchange-traded contracts don't go that far.
